work.desc_title: Homilies of Hesychius of Jerusalem and Gregory of Nazianzus
creator: ark:/21198/s1js3q

note: Fragments of homilies of Hesychius of Jerusalem and Gregory of Nazianzus

bib.citation: Aubineau, Michel. Les homelies festales d' Hesychius de Jerusalem. Vol.1. Les homelies i-xv. Subsidia hagiographica 59. Brussels, 1978
Moreschini, Claudio, ed., and Paul Gallay, tr. Gregoire de Nazianze. Discours 38-41. Sources Chretiennes, no 358. Paris, 1990
bib.range: Discours 39, Sur les lumieres( Εις τα Φώτα), pp.150-197

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
